## Summary

## Definition of Done (docs/44)
- [ ] Tests pass (unit + integration); coverage meets target
- [ ] Authorization enforced (role + ABAC); audit events emitted
- [ ] EN + AR strings (no hardcoded text); verified in RTL
- [ ] Accessibility pass (axe)
- [ ] No secrets committed; no new high/critical vulns
- [ ] Acceptance criteria met (list AC-###)
- [ ] ADR added/updated if a decision changed; ASM-/OQ- recorded
- [ ] Progress log + acceptance audit updated
